name: Data443 Risk Mitigation, Inc.
summary: PART I . Our company was incorporated as LandStar, Inc., a Nevada corporation, on May 4, 1998. We provide data security and privacy management solutions across the enterprise and in the cloud. Trusted by over 10,000 customers, we provide the visibility and control needed to protect data at scale, regardless of format, location, or consumer, and to facilitate compliance with fast-changing global data privacy requirements. Our customers include established leaders and up-and-coming businesses span...
